steps.title: Match the target expression
steps.content: You do not need to solve for $x$. The expression being asked for is $28+4x$, and that factors as $$28+4x=4(7+x).$$

steps.title: Use the given value
steps.content: Since $7+x=11$, substitute directly into the factored expression: $$28+4x=4(7+x)=4(11)=44.$$ The answer is 44. Solving for $x$ first also works, but factoring the target is faster.
